prompt: Studio portrait of a smiling woman in a dark red hoodie and grey pants sitting on a wooden plank floor against a solid grey background. Her red sneakers are prominent in the foreground, with one lace being tied by two miniature clones of herself. Other tiny duplicates engage in playful activities around her: three clones have tied the long loose ends of a shoelace to a small wood chip and are dragging it like a sled; another clone is standing and waving on one side, while a few others peek frombehind her sleeve and waist. The perspective emphasizes the size difference between the large woman and her miniature clones. Shot on a Canon 5D Mark IV, studio lighting, natural grain, ultra-realistic style. 9:16 vertical aspect ratio.
